intro: Achyronia lanata, also known as hairy achyronia, is a perennial herbaceous plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects that can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, such as arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Achyronia lanata include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Achyronia lanata is commonly used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
